name: Go module pin for meshery/schemas is a valid semver
description: TP-015 TC-015-023: go.mod must pin github.com/meshery/schemas to a concrete semver

steps.name: REQUIRE: pinned version must be non-empty
REQUIRE: pinned version "v1.3.7" must match semver

parameters.name: Expected
parameters.value: *regexp.Regexp(&regexp.Regexp{expr:"^v?(\\d+)\\.(\\d+)\\.(\\d+)(?:-[0-9A-Za-z.-]+)?$", prog:(*syntax.Prog)(0x335338c44c00), onepass:(*regexp.onePassProg)(0x335338c44c60), numSubexp:3, maxBitStateLen:0, subexpNames:[]string{"", "", "", ""}, prefix:"", prefixBytes:[]uint8(nil), prefixRune:0, prefixEnd:0x1, mpool:0, matchcap:8, prefixComplete:false, cond:0x4, minInputLen:5, longest:false})
